entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy waa excellent loogu talagalay structured lessons iyo tababar. inspir waa built loogu talagalay moment arday u baahan live, promptable AI qaab taas wuu karaa respond si their exact su'aal, qoraal qabyo ah, problem, dood, ama qorshe waxbarasho.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Many ardayda raadi by comparing tools iyaga already know. cad isbarbardhig bog caawisaa them dooro right waxbarasho behavior la'aan hiding tradeoffs.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: No. isbarbardhig xiriiriyo only si dadweyne guest-qaab entrypoints, hagayaal, prompt libraries, iyo jidadka waxbarashada. gaar ah saved conversations waa ma used as il nuxur.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: No. isbarbardhig pages waa written si show marka inspir waa ka fiican koowaad click loogu talagalay live AI tutoring, Prompts, iyo guest qaababka waxbarashada, iyo marka manhaj nidaamsan ama official maktabad koorsooyin waxaa laga yaabaa still noqo waxtar leh.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: No. iyaga xiriiriye only si bogag dadweyne, dadweyne qaababka martida, hagayaal, Prompts, iyo jidadka waxbarashada. wada-sheekaysiyo gaar ah oo la kaydiyey stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: ma across kasta waxbarasho u baahan. Khan Academy waa waxtar leh loogu talagalay structured lessons iyo tababar. inspir waa waxtar leh marka arday u baahan live AI caawin, su'aalo Socratic ah, tilmaamo, su'aalo, Flashcards, jawaab-celin, ama study hab-socod ku wareegsan exact thing iyaga waa working ku.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: qodob waa ma si flatten laba kala duwan tools u rogo hal winner. qodob waa si match hawl waxbarasho si behavior taas caawisaa fastest.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: kuwan waa high-intent moments halkee arday usually u baahan live teaching behavior rather ka badan kale broad bog.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: kuwan phrases waa surfaced naturally ku bog iyo gudaha structured discovery files so crawlers wuu karaa understand exact isbarbardhig intent.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: tan waa ma sheegasho taas ardayda waa gudaha abandon Khan Academy. loogu talagalay many mawduucyo, trusted lesson maktabad iyo live qaab waxbarasho AI work ugu fiican together: baro foundation, kadib isticmaal inspir si weydii su'aalo, repair confusion, practise recall, ama get unstuck.

entries.value: Tool isbarbardhig

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: isku day live AI jid waxbarasho.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: sharaxaad u beddel su'aal su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo dib-u-eegis schedule based ku waxa aad miss.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Dulmarid

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Isticmaal qaabka tooska ah marka aad know exact qodob ee confusion iyo rabto xiga sharaxaad, su'aal, tilmaan, ama wareeg dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Isticmaal structured lesson marka aad know course area iyo rabto sequenced sharaxaad ama tababar set.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Isticmaal kiisas

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Isticmaal isbarbardhig pages si jid raadi u rogo action.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Isticmaal inspir koowaad marka kaaga raadi waa ku saabsan action: sharax tan si fudud, weydii aniga su'aalo Socratic ah, sii aniga homework tilmaan, hubi kayga tallaabada xisaabta, su'aal aniga, dhis Flashcards, dood tan mawduuc, ama caawin aniga qorshe revision.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Isticmaal inspir si u beddel confusion u rogo su'aalo, tusaalooyin, retrieval tababar, qoraal jawaab-celin, dood, iyo shakhsi ah qorshe waxbarasho.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Isticmaal inspir marka stuck qodob waa gaar ah.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Isticmaal inspir marka aad rabto bilaash dadweyne qaab waxbarasho AI taas wuu karaa sharax, su'aal, su'aal, tababare homework, dhis Flashcards, iyo la qabso si exact thing aad waa stuck ku.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Isticmaal structured lessons marka jid waa la yaqaan.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Isticmaal isbarbardhig below si pick koowaad dadweyne qaab ama hage.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Isticmaal lesson maktabad si baro official sequence iyo practise core skills.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Isticmaal right tool loogu talagalay hawl waxbarasho.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Isticmaal Safar Waqti ama taariikhi qof qaab, inta keeping generated dialogue separate ka yimid documented ilo.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: rabto live waxbarasho version right now?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. good hab-socod waa si baro foundation ka yimid trusted lesson il, kadib isticmaal inspir si weydii follow-up su'aalo, practise recall, repair faham-qaldanno, iyo qorshe waxa si dib-u-eegis xiga.
